title: Neuro-Linguistic Programming for Dummies
author: Romilla Ready
subline: Rewire your brain with the power of language.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A simple brain outline (left hemisphere). Inside the brain, two neural pathways of dots. One pathway is being REDIRECTED — a red loop closes the circuit. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Brain silhouette (left profile, simplified) -->
    <path d="M -260 -200 Q -360 -200 -380 -120 Q -420 -60 -380 0 Q -420 60 -360 100 Q -340 160 -240 180 Q -180 220 -100 200 Q -40 220 40 180 Q 100 200 140 140 Q 200 80 180 0 Q 200 -80 140 -140 Q 100 -200 20 -200 Q -60 -240 -140 -220 Q -200 -240 -260 -200 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Old pathway: a chain of ash dots in a default zigzag -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <circle cx="-200" cy="-100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-140" cy="-60" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-80" cy="-100" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-20" cy="-60" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="40" cy="-100" r="5"/>
    </g>
    <line x1="-200" y1="-100" x2="-140" y2="-60" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <line x1="-140" y1="-60" x2="-80" y2="-100" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <line x1="-80" y1="-100" x2="-20" y2="-60" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <line x1="-20" y1="-60" x2="40" y2="-100" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- New pathway: a red arc that bypasses the loop -->
    <path d="M 40 -100 Q 100 -200 0 -220 Q -100 -200 -200 -100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <circle cx="-200" cy="-100" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="40" cy="-100" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A few words along the red path (the 'linguistic' input) -->
    <text x="-80" y="-180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.1em">NEW</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">REWIRE THE BRAIN · REROUTE THE THOUGHT</text>
</svg>
rationale: A hairline brain silhouette. Inside: an old ash pathway of dots zigzagging in a default pattern, and a new RED arc that bypasses the loop, terminating in a red 6px dot on each end. The red arc is the linguistic input rerouting the neural net. Title 280px mixed case, two lines, weight 300.
